jutsu.name: Kunai Throw
jutsu.description: A swift thrown blade. High critical-hit ratio.

jutsu.name: Shuriken Barrage
jutsu.description: A flurry of thrown stars. Hits 2-5 times.

jutsu.name: Demon Wind Shuriken
jutsu.description: A massive folding shuriken. Very high crit ratio.

jutsu.name: Explosive Tag
jutsu.description: A rigged paper bomb. 20% burn.

jutsu.name: Fire Style: Fireball Jutsu
jutsu.description: The Uchiha rite of passage. 10% burn.

jutsu.name: Phoenix Flower Jutsu
jutsu.description: Volley of small fireballs. Each may burn.

jutsu.name: Dragon Flame Bullet
jutsu.description: A roaring dragon of flame. Likely burns.

jutsu.name: Majestic Destroyer Flame
jutsu.description: Sets the field ablaze: Fire x1.3, Water x0.7 for 3 turns.

jutsu.name: Ash Pile Burning
jutsu.description: Smouldering ash that seeps through substitutes.

jutsu.name: Hidden Embers
jutsu.description: Bank inner flame: NIN +1.

jutsu.name: Wind Style: Great Breakthrough
jutsu.description: A flattening gale. May slow the foe.

jutsu.name: Pressure Damage
jutsu.description: Compressed air slams the target. 20% stun.

jutsu.name: Cutting Whirlwind
jutsu.description: Blades of wind that leave deep cuts.

jutsu.name: Wind Scythe Jutsu
jutsu.description: Temari's fan unleashes slicing gusts.

jutsu.name: Chidori
jutsu.description: One Thousand Birds. Reckless: user's DEF falls.

jutsu.name: Chidori Current
jutsu.description: Lightning radiates from the body. 30% paralysis.

jutsu.name: Thunderbolt
jutsu.description: A bolt from gathered storm chakra.

jutsu.name: Purple Electricity
jutsu.description: Kakashi's refined bolt. Pierces protection.

jutsu.name: Summoning: Thundercloud
jutsu.description: Seeds the sky with storm chakra. Enables Kirin.

jutsu.name: Kirin
jutsu.description: Heaven's own lightning. Needs a thundercloud; never misses; ignores defenses.

jutsu.name: Earth Style: Mud Wall
jutsu.description: Raise a rampart: DEF +2.

jutsu.name: Swamp of the Underworld
jutsu.description: The ground turns to mire.

jutsu.name: Headhunter Jutsu
jutsu.description: Drag them under from below. Slows the target.

jutsu.name: Tectonic Shift
jutsu.description: Splits the field: Earth x1.3 for 3 turns.

jutsu.name: Sand Coffin
jutsu.description: Sand binds the target. Usually stuns.

jutsu.name: Sand Burial
jutsu.description: The coffin closes. Crushing damage.

jutsu.name: Water Shark Bullet
jutsu.description: A chakra shark that feeds its caster.

jutsu.name: Water Dragon Bullet
jutsu.description: A serpent of crushing water.

jutsu.name: Water Prison Jutsu
jutsu.description: A sphere of inescapable water. Traps the target.

jutsu.name: Hidden Mist Jutsu
jutsu.description: Vanish into rolling mist: EVA +1.

jutsu.name: Water Clone Jutsu
jutsu.description: A clone of water takes the next hit.

jutsu.name: Demonic Mirroring Ice Crystals
jutsu.description: Haku's kekkei genkai. Strikes from every mirror.

jutsu.name: Demonic Illusion: Hell Viewing
jutsu.description: A vision of horror. Confuses the target.

jutsu.name: Demonic Illusion: Binding
jutsu.description: The mind sinks into darkness. Sleep.

jutsu.name: Sharingan Hypnosis
jutsu.description: Meet the eye and falter.

jutsu.name: Shadow Possession Jutsu
jutsu.description: Shikamaru's shadow binds the foe still.

jutsu.name: Mind Transfer Jutsu
jutsu.description: Ino's consciousness invades the target.

jutsu.name: Chakra Leech Seal
jutsu.description: A parasitic seal siphons the foe's reserves.

jutsu.name: Gentle Fist
jutsu.description: Hyuga strikes that close chakra points.

jutsu.name: Eight Trigrams: 64 Palms
jutsu.description: A storm of sealing strikes.

jutsu.name: Leaf Hurricane
jutsu.description: A sweeping taijutsu kick.

jutsu.name: Primary Lotus
jutsu.description: Gates open. Devastating, but the body pays.

jutsu.name: Eight Gates: Morning Peacock
jutsu.description: Fists faster than flame. Heavy recoil.

jutsu.name: Fang Over Fang
jutsu.description: Kiba and Akamaru drill through the foe.

jutsu.name: Chakra Scalpel
jutsu.description: A surgeon's blade of chakra.

jutsu.name: Twin Lion Fists
jutsu.description: Hinata's chakra lions devour the foe's reserves.

jutsu.name: Human Boulder
jutsu.description: Choji rolls over everything in his path.

jutsu.name: Shadow Clone Jutsu
jutsu.description: Clones swarm the field: STR +1, EVA +1.

jutsu.name: Substitution Jutsu
jutsu.description: Priority +3. A log takes the next hit.

jutsu.name: Rasengan
jutsu.description: A sphere of pure spiraling chakra. Cannot be dodged.

jutsu.name: Wind Style: Rasenshuriken
jutsu.description: Sage-honed wind severs chakra itself.

jutsu.name: Mystical Palm Jutsu
jutsu.description: Heals 50% max HP and cures status.

jutsu.name: Byakugou Release
jutsu.description: Stored chakra erupts: full heal, cure, STR +1.

jutsu.name: Striking Shadow Snakes
jutsu.description: Snakes lash from the sleeve. 40% poison.

jutsu.name: Poison Mist
jutsu.description: A purple haze of toxins.

jutsu.name: Puppet: Iron Maiden
jutsu.description: Kankuro's puppet snaps shut on the target.

jutsu.name: Summoning: Toad Boss
jutsu.description: The Chief Toad answers. Massive area damage.

jutsu.name: Summoning: Rashomon
jutsu.description: The demon gate rises: DEF/RES +2.

jutsu.name: Reaper Death Seal (Suppressed)
jutsu.description: Forbidden sealing art. Seals the target's chakra.

jutsu.name: Cursed Seal: Level 2
jutsu.description: Embrace the forbidden mark: STR/NIN surge while the body is drained.
